app.title: Chat Vault
drawer.title: Chat Vault
drawer.note: Main UI lives in the floating panel
drawer.showTriggerDesc: Hide the floating entry point. You can still reopen the panel from here.
panel.subtitle: Auto backups, unsaved edits, and disaster recovery
status.currentUnavailable: Backend is unavailable, backups cannot be read right now.
status.currentEmpty: This chat has no backups yet.
status.recoveryIdle: Pick a chat from the left list to view its backups.
status.recoveryUnavailable: Backend is unavailable, backups cannot be read right now.
draft.note: Restore tries to put the text back into the matching editor. Discard removes this unsaved edit record.
draft.restoreSuccess: Unsaved edit restored into the editor.
chat.toolbarHint: Refresh reloads the current state. Backup Now creates a manual backup immediately. Recovery jumps to the global recovery view.
chat.section.backupsHint: Auto and manual backups for the current chat
chat.searchPlaceholder: Search by backup name / preview / trigger
chat.searchEmpty: No matching backups in the current chat.
chat.backupsNote: Auto backups roll forward by count. Once marked for long-term keep, that backup will not be pushed out by auto rotation.
recovery.section.title: Disaster Recovery
recovery.section.scopeHint: Works even without the current chat open
recovery.searchPlaceholder: Search by character name / chat name
recovery.backupSearchPlaceholder: Search by backup name / preview / trigger
recovery.backupSearchEmpty: No matching backups in this chat scope.
recovery.useCase: When to use it: the current chat file broke, the chat list no longer opens, you no longer remember the original chat name, or you want to pull back an older stage directly from server-side backups.
recovery.capability: What it can do: browse the global chat scopes without relying on the current chat being open, inspect backups under each scope, and restore any one of them as a new chat. Direct overwrite is intentionally disabled here to avoid mistakes.
recovery.emptySelectFirst: Select a chat from the left first.
recovery.loadFailed: Failed to load the recovery list.
recovery.loadFailedToast: Failed to load the recovery list.
recovery.scopeNotFound: The selected recovery scope could not be found.
recovery.openFailed: Failed to open the selected recovery scope.
recovery.restoreNewOnly: Recovery view only supports restore as new chat.
cloud.section.title: Cloud Vault
cloud.section.scopeHint: Shows what the remote vault currently keeps
cloud.section.selectedHint: Preview, import locally, or restore as a new chat
cloud.scopeSearchPlaceholder: Search by character name / chat name / source device
cloud.backupSearchPlaceholder: Search by backup name / preview / trigger / source device
cloud.backupSearchEmpty: No matching cloud backups in this scope.
cloud.status.idle: Connect a repository first, then load the remote catalog.
cloud.status.missingConfig: No repository URL has been configured yet.
cloud.status.missingToken: Repository URL is set, but no access token is saved yet.
cloud.status.emptyRemote: Repository is connected, but no cloud backups exist yet.
cloud.useCase: When to use it: you want a second Git-based storage layer so another device can pull the same long-term and stable backups.
cloud.capability: What it can do: push selected local backups into a dedicated Git repository; merge remote listings from multiple devices without sharing the live chat directory; let another device browse, import into its local Chat Vault, or restore any remote snapshot as a new chat. It is not a real-time sync engine. Local storage remains the main recovery chain.
cloud.retentionExplain: Retention rule: the cloud side now behaves like an append-only vault. Deleting local cards, personas, lorebooks, or local backups will not silently erase older cloud copies. You can now manually delete individual cloud backups.
cloud.importExplain: Import Local: put character cards / personas / lorebooks / groups into the normal SillyTavern resource folders, then store the chat snapshot inside local Chat Vault. It does not create a live chat file under `chats/` yet.
cloud.restoreExplain: Restore as New Chat: import missing character cards / personas / lorebooks / groups first, then restore this backup as a brand new live chat, meaning a normal chat file is created.
cloud.fields.repoUrlHint: A private HTTPS repository is recommended.
cloud.fields.tokenHint: Stored only on this server instance and used for fetch/push operations.
cloud.fields.tokenHintSaved: A token is already stored on this server. Enter a new one to replace it.
cloud.fields.deviceNameHint: Used to mark which device published this cloud state.
cloud.fields.deviceNamePlaceholder: For example: Mac mini / VPS / Windows
cloud.fields.syncLatest: Sync one stable backup per chat scope
cloud.emptyNoConfig: Enter a repository URL and token first.
cloud.emptyNoData: No cloud backups are available yet.
cloud.emptyLoadFailed: Failed to load the remote catalog.
cloud.emptySelectFirst: Select a scope from the left first.
cloud.emptyNoBackups: This scope currently has no cloud backups.
cloud.toasts.statusFailed: Failed to load Cloud Vault status.
cloud.toasts.listFailed: Failed to load the remote catalog.
cloud.toasts.synced: Synced to cloud: {scopes} scopes / {snapshots} backups / {resources} linked resources.
cloud.toasts.imported: Cloud backup imported into local Chat Vault.
cloud.toasts.importSkipped: Matching local backup already exists, import skipped.
cloud.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the backup from Cloud Vault and cleans up resources that are no longer referenced by any cloud backup.
settings.themeHint: Panel and floating orb switch together
settings.themeNote: This only changes Chat Vault's own panel look. It does not change SillyTavern's global theme.
settings.showRecoveryToast: Show reminder when something recoverable is detected
settings.triggerNote: The floating orb switch stays in the drawer entry so you can hide or reopen it anytime.
settings.behaviorNote: These switches only affect behavior going forward. Existing backups are not rewritten.
settings.autoBackupCountHint: `1` keeps one rolling auto backup, `N` keeps the latest N auto backups
settings.saveDelayHint: How soon to trigger a real save after a commit event, in milliseconds
settings.draftDelayHint: How often in-progress edits are synced to the server, in milliseconds
settings.namingNote: The restore template affects the suggested chat name during restore-as-new. The internal backup filename template only affects the underlying archive filename.
toasts.statusLoadFailed: Failed to load Chat Vault status.
toasts.detectBackup: A more complete backup was detected.
toasts.missingCharacter: Matching character not found. Cannot restore as a new chat.
toasts.missingGroup: Matching group not found. Cannot restore as a new chat.
toasts.emptyBackup: Backup content is empty and cannot be restored.
toasts.overwriteFailed: Failed to overwrite the current chat.
popup.restoreNew.title: Restore as New Chat
popup.restoreNew.body: This creates a new chat and does not overwrite the current one. You can rename it first.
popup.overwrite.title: Overwrite Current Chat
popup.overwrite.body: This directly overwrites the current chat file.
popup.deleteBackup.title: Delete Chat Backup
popup.renameBackup.title: Rename Chat Backup
popup.renameBackup.body: This changes the display name and renames the underlying backup file.
